---
pagetitle: "Teaching | Jubayer Hossain"
excerpt: "A list of selected courses of me"
page-layout: full
---
I am Lead Organizer and Instructor at [CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/), developed and delivered curriculum, organized workshops and hands-on sessions, mentored participants, evaluated performance. Below you can find a list of my courses and workshops. 


## Cancer Bioinformatics 
::: {layout-ncol=2}
{{< video https://youtu.be/D6jEeuxZDGU?si=1gL22eVp2oRgAlsL >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/tdrE9vBv5_M?si=RQttOuETqT-Nk5UY >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/Kwf_zJ_N_Mo?si=bjLbPCKlAgSOS730 >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/xaql1cXTn0A?si=auyf0Wal1ysf_OYL >}}

:::


## R for Research 

::: {layout-ncol=2}
{{< video https://youtu.be/WiboyIkAFqo?si=MXq8fSH2Ykf93Ome >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/Zb_bgEcW9gk?si=CET9jGx2SdgTfAK8 >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/lLNEfn3eLY8?si=_H_Vwu-uJ6FOFtfw >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/g9BhM5LuXcE?si=JqzA0HBsekbnMxpt >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/PDPmsgo82hE?si=osYZpX1woOMhA5eJ >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/DBESvQjhslw?si=6Ve9LW-jX-s1otvn >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/Lu7utop2QJA?si=vqTbArNVbD0WRMsb >}}

{{< video https://youtu.be/JcaGBHQGAWs?si=v-pqFI_bxi3RUAjF >}}

:::



## Bioinformatics BootCamp
- **June 15, 2023 - August 3, 2023**. 
*Bioinformatics BootCamp 1.0*
at [Big Bioinformatics Lab (BigBio Lab), CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/bigbio-lab/).
[Contents](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cSFujIb7EDt99mwYSzvizozX_off8jcb/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=105827344756324006071&rtpof=true&sd=true){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}


- **August 8, 2023 - August 26, 2023**. 
*Bioinformatics BootCamp 2.0*
at [Big Bioinformatics Lab (BigBio Lab), CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/bigbio-lab/).
[Contents](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1JHtlILH98Q0jN8N5lJdSCLNKSnhwCVk4lw0mKDOd6Qw/edit?usp=sharing){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}

- **October 20, 2023 - November 9, 2023**. 
*Bioinformatics BootCamp 3.0*
at [Big Bioinformatics Lab (BigBio Lab), CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/bigbio-lab/).
[Contents](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1dnr7e41BTTHlPonTtKAaeL6MNWincJ-0HcAX-eH6Uvw/edit?usp=sharing){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}

- **January 25, 2024 - February 12, 2024**. 
*Bioinformatics BootCamp 4.0*
at [Big Bioinformatics Lab (BigBio Lab), CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/bigbio-lab/).
[Contents](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1M9ezaQlKAMBE1KhlkK-YjMYG_dohv3yTLy9S1kfe8JM/edit?usp=sharing){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}

- **January 25, 2024 - February 12, 2024**. 
*Bioinformatics BootCamp 5.0*
at [Big Bioinformatics Lab (BigBio Lab), CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/bigbio-lab/).
[Contents](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1SbjK60CsHeDyhMV6MeM82qvWWtXSOPAvgd8E9W3SRW8/edit?usp=sharing){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}


## Cancer Bioinformatics 

- **May 10, 2024 - May 10, 2024**. 
*Cancer Bioinformatics (Cohort 01)*
at [Big Bioinformatics Lab (BigBio Lab), CHIRAL Bangladesh](https://chiralbd.org/bigbio-lab/).
[Contents](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1o5Hkx_YqfJF-CatZcRX7_WsXTjLdoQ3C-GFvfY4htDI/edit?usp=sharing){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" .btn-page-header .btn-xs}
